findings.summary: Stage 0 lacked a durable whole-stage closure that persisted the external compensation resolution and user acceptance target.
findings.resolution: Added a tracked whole-stage evidence index, executable verifier, typed execution ledger, review audit, rollback record and evidence-bound acceptance request. Human acceptance remains intentionally absent.

findings.summary: Phase 0.2 and Phase 0.3 terminal records were semantic task ledgers rather than a portable fresh executable command ledger.
findings.resolution: Added verify_stage0_whole_review.py with an exact invocation. terminal.log now reserves COMMAND for complete argv and represents independent reviews or temporary-shadow setup as typed result records.

findings.summary: The trace lifecycle initially omitted the external review-commit attestation gate retained by the other current-truth surfaces.
findings.resolution: Aligned trace, event, delivery and owner/status lifecycle to pending external review-commit attestation plus evidence-bound user acceptance.

findings.summary: The historical priority registry selector FND-030 was not unique inside PHASE_0_3_DESIGN.md.
findings.resolution: Preserved immutable P03 evidence and added the correction-specific unique line selector overlay below, which supersedes the ambiguous selector for all current interpretation.

selector_compensation.selector: | FND-030 | `PFI/web/app/home.js` 缺失 | P01-RISK-03;P01-CONFLICT:FORMAL_UI_HOME_SOURCE_MISSING | NOT_APPLICABLE | New / P1 | VERIFIED / SUBFINDING-FND-003-P1 | P03_TERM / new_current_fact | NOT_APPLICABLE | S1-P1-T3;S6-P2-T1;S6-P2-T2 |
